nasb.text: For thus says the Lord, “Behold, I am slinging out the inhabitants of the land At this time, And will cause them distress, That they may be found.”

esv.text: For thus says the Lord: “Behold, I am slinging out the inhabitants of the land at this time, and I will bring distress on them, that they may feel it.”

cnv.text: 因為耶和華這樣說： “看哪！在這時候， 我要把這地的居民投擲出去； 又使他們受困苦， 以致他們被壓倒。”

ccb.text: 因为耶和华说： “看啊，这次我要把这地方的居民抛出去， 使他们苦不堪言。”
